description: This pipeline converts label images into 3D regions of interest, utilizing an intermediate step that involves copying physical pixel sizes from a source to a target, ensuring accurate calibration and grouping of data based on annotations.

f833f9f1-e4e8-40a6-8575-1adf1df0073c.name: ij3d-labels-to-roi
f833f9f1-e4e8-40a6-8575-1adf1df0073c.description: Converts a label image into 3D ROI

95bd30e1-b239-4387-a4f5-6e441801a368.name: ij1-calibration-copy-physical-dimensions
95bd30e1-b239-4387-a4f5-6e441801a368.description:
Copies the phyiscal pixel sizes from the source to the target

This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of one data item per slot.
